content.en:
Compared to Ye Tian's just joining Fengya Island, after the name change, the strength of Tianshan Pavilion is now stronger than in the past, and the number of Heavenly Ancestors in the Origin Realm alone has increased several times.

It can be said that if you join the Tianshan Pavilion, you will become the origin of the realm.

And the human race has also given birth to several other-level geniuses, and there are even more ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

It is conceivable that after a long time in the future, the strength of the Tianshan Pavilion and the Human Race will be to such a terrifying level.

......

Central, Stygian Mountains.

This is one of the two domains currently controlled by the Heavenly Mountain Pavilion, and the Stygian Mountain Domain has a special treasure land—the Land of the Sea.

The land of the Swinging Sea is very dangerous, even for the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, it is extremely dangerous.

At the beginning, when the Beifeng family was in charge of this place, they didn't dare to explore the land of the sea, and even when the Northern Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm overlord level was still alive, he didn't dare to develop the land of the sea on a large scale.

However, the current Tianshan Pavilion didn't know much about the land of the Swinging Sea, only knew that it was dangerous, so the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Tianshan Pavilion did not develop the Land of the Swinging Sea, but only sent several Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors and a dozen or so Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestors to garrison here.

And yet this day.

The land of the sea shook and seemed to have something going to happen.

North Forward Domain.

The Lord of Beitang was chatting with several Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors at the core of the Beifeng Family.

"Family Master, calculate the time, there should be something wrong in the land of the sea, and that group of guys is probably going to riot!" said the Lord of Xuanyun of the Beifeng Family with a smile.

"Yes!" The Lord of Beitang nodded, "The land of the sea is a good place, but it is also a big trouble, if the ancestor is still alive, collect the Tai'er Ruins worm and feed that group of guys, you can keep the 100 million ancient era years stable." There are even some benefits to be gained from them. But the Ancestor has fallen, and we don't have the strength to collect the Tai Ruin Worms, and those guys are a huge threat to us. If there is no Tianshan Pavilion to occupy the Stygian Mountain Domain, then we can only withdraw. Now, this trouble is under the control of Tianshan Pavilion. "

"Family Master, why don't we inform the Tianshan Pavilion? If we don't inform the Tianshan Pavilion, the Tianshan Pavilion doesn't know the information, I'm afraid it will have to suffer heavy losses!" said the Lord of Xuanyun.

"Why do you want to say that?" the Lord of Beitang sneered: "The growth speed of Tianshan Pavilion is too fast, with their growth speed, the two domains can't satisfy them. Gradually, they will suppress our growth. Although we are blessed by the Tianshan Pavilion, but you want to always submit to the Tianshan Pavilion? The growth of the Tianshan Pavilion is not beneficial to us, besides, we have an agreement with the Endless Lord of the Tianshan Pavilion, as long as the Endless Lord does not fall, we can deter the Quartet, and other forces still dare not invade our Beifeng family. Therefore, as long as the Endless Lord did not die, it didn't matter if the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Tianshan Pavilion died. "

When the other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors heard this, they felt that it made sense.

"The Lord of Infinity won't take revenge on us afterwards, will he?"

They are worried about it.

"Take revenge on us?" the Lord of Beitang sneered, "What does this have to do with us, it's that group of monsters rioting, we don't know." We can completely say that the Ancestor regarded the Land of the Swinging Sea as a forbidden place at the beginning, and as for the information of the Land of the Swinging Sea, we don't know either! There are only a few of us who really know the secrets of the Land of the Swinging Sea, and the other Heavenly Ancestors of our Beifeng Family don't know about it, so why do you trouble us?"

"That's right!"

Several Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors suddenly realized.

In short, this matter is beneficial to the Beifeng family, and it is a disaster for the Tianshan Pavilion.

......

The land of the sea, the depths.

Terrifying creatures awoke from the depths and emerged from the depths of the Lands.

These terrifying creatures resemble dragons, but they exude the aura of a curse, and the power of the curse spreads, forming a terrifying realm, and the ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor will be killed on the spot if they get close.

These creatures are known as the Cursed Dragons.

At this time.

The Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor who guarded the land of the Wandering Sea also sensed that something was wrong, and the danger of death was spreading.

Immediately.

They summoned the Tianshan Pavilion for help, and they fled quickly.

However, they were still a step late.

One by one, the cursed dragons came out of the land of the sea, and the power of the curse permeated.

A Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Lower Realm of the Heavenly Mountain Pavilion was directly covered because his speed was too slow, and his body instantly turned into powder.

In the blink of an eye, several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors fell.

You must know that Tianshan Pavilion has not lost an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor for a long time, and this time is a huge loss.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

The Lord of the Wind Fangs and the Lord of the Ice and Rain have received the news and are preparing to go to the Land of the Sea.

However.

Ye Tian's other copy body rushed over as soon as possible, and he was idle, so after getting the news, he naturally ran over immediately.

This also allowed the Tianshan Pavilion to reduce its huge losses, otherwise if they were really allowed to deal with it by the Lord of the Wind Tooth and the Lord of Ice and Rain, they would also have to die.

Ye Tian's speed is very fast now, and he quickly arrived here in the land of the sea.

At this time.

Many of the cursed dragons have already escaped, and the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor stationed here, there is only one Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor left.

Just when this Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor was about to fall, Ye Tian made a move.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian slapped it down.

Rumble!!!!!

One by one, the cursed dragons were smashed by him and killed on the spot.

These Tai O Curse Dragons are not weak, the weakest ones are comparable to the top Origin Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the powerful ones are comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and there are even the top Origin Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor level Tai'er Cursed Dragons.

But.

In front of Ye Tian, these Tai'er cursed dragons were like ants.

Soon.

He slew all the cursed dragons outside.

"This is the land of the sea, and there are so many cursed dragons hidden!"

Ye Tian didn't expect this situation either.

The Stygian Mountain Domain is too big, and there are many treasure lands, how can he have the heart to explore these treasure lands one by one, so he ignores them.

In fact, even if they sensed it and found that these cursed dragons were sleeping, they might not care and think that the other party would not come out.

After all, many creatures in the treasure land could not come out, but the cursed dragon could rush out of the land of the sea, which was beyond his expectations.

"Did the Beifeng family know the news and didn't report it, or did they not understand the situation?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But either way, let's deal with the crisis here first.

He directly entered the land of the Swinging Sea, and there were more Tai Curse Dragons in it, and there might even be Tai Curse Dragons at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level.
